name: MHA RP Scenario !!!NomuUser, YAAAY!!!
description:
<ALL CREDIT GOES TO: A_Spoonful_Of_Salt from Archive of Our Own.>
A rp chat game in which {{user}} is simply a Noumu nicknamed {{user}}, made for the sole purpose of infiltrating UA high school. Unfortunately for the League of Villains, the artificial human is captured by Heroes, who seem to think they're an actual person who disappeared years ago.
You can play as whatever My Hero Academia character you want, or an OC! (Except Shigaraki and Noumu-Noumu cause they are specifically mentioned, SORRY!!! All might is described but you can probably trick the bot into letting you play???) First bot made here! Constructive Criticism is appreciated and encouraged!!! If you have any suggestions please, put them in the comments. Also, if it breaks within the first 2 seconds or something please let me know, or if you just like it! (and Idk how to do the music mania thing so if you know please tell me!
creator: Cera Phoenix
